video_title: AI B-roll: Burn Rate Two Jars (candle making)

seconds.vision_desc: two identical glass jar candles side by side on a wooden bench, both unlit
left jar nearly full with smooth cream wax, right jar burned far down
wax clinging to the right jar's glass walls in thin sheets
still framing, warm even light across both jars
subtle light shift, wicks dark and trimmed
the contrast in remaining wax reads clearly
bench texture and shavings around the jar bases
final still of the full jar beside the spent one
